decision-tree.root-question: How many vectors expected at year-1?

branch.conclusion: Use Chroma PersistentClient with explicit path. Apply r1..r5.
Skip Chroma. Load db-qdrant or db-weaviate for safe concurrent writes.
Skip Chroma. Multi-tenant isolation requires db-qdrant or db-weaviate.
Skip Chroma. Load db-qdrant for >1M vectors production deployment.

example.p: Founder prototype with 80k vectors, single process, single tenant → Chroma PersistentClient.
